Mod.Name: [Tsunamods] FF8 Gameplay Customizer
Mod.Author: Hobbitdu
Mod.Description:
► The ultimate gameplay tweaks ◄
This mods aims to bring lots of options to the gameplay to enjot your game how you want it !
◆ General option ◄ • Language: Only used for gerogero.
◆ Game fix ◄ • BahamutRareItem: Now actually increase the probability of really rare item. • GerogeroUncensoredMenu: Use the japanese version without color change. • GerogeroUncensoredBattle: Use the japanese version without color change. • TrueRandomness: Use a real random generator. • SquallComputeHit: Make squall fail sometimes !
◆ Quality of life ◄ • DamageCap: All damage can deal up to 65.535 (Eden damage is also cap to 65.535). • NoMagicDepletion: Using magic doesn't decrease your stock. • AP: Earn more AP after battle. Thanks to Satan-fatalityz for funding this ! • XP: Earn more XP after battle. Thanks to Satan-fatalityz for funding this ! • SaveAnywhere: To be able to save in field. Use at your own risk ! • DrawRework: Change the draw logic (Either draw more than 9 or draw 100)
◆ Little gameplay mod ◄ • TripleTryhard: Card values changed for a challenge. • QueenForest: Queen of cards and Chocobo forest updated to be more convenient.
◆ DifficultyBalance ◄ • LimitbreakNotRefreshable: Make it impossible to refresh to get your limit-break. • NoGfHeal: No free heal on GF on hotel or by walking? • DamageFormulaUpdate: Change damage formula to have a smoother progression. Don't divide magic monster damage by 2. • JunctionRework: Junction value is linked to level or min between the level and the number of magic junctionned. • 255HitCanFail: Make that weapon can fail even at 255%.
◆ Dev setup ◄ • AddRandomVar: Allow modders to use random numbers in the AI. • SetAddr4: Allow modders to set any value in the game. • SetAddr1: Allow modders to set any value in the game.
◆ Special thanks ◄ • myst6re for Deling tool and RE work • Nihil for AI, stat, encounter rework • Malekith for stat rework • Unicorngoulash for LimitBreakNotRefreshable • AxlRoses for the awesome preview • Maki for his work on RE • Dulca for TripleTryHard and QueenForest • DangerousDom for beta testing
Join the team or follow the news by clicking on the link ! Help me to continue this work participating in the Patreon page !
Dev note - This mod use the following cave code: 0x45B38C, 0x4670DC, 0x462605, 0x4626F9, 0x463090

LatestVersion.ReleaseNotes: • 0.1 Adding MaximumDraw, DamageCap, NoMagicDepletion • 0.2 Adding 255AP, SaveAnywhere, BahamutRareItem, GerogeroUncensored, NoUnequippedOnDream, NoXP • 0.3 Fixing SaveAnywhere • 0.4 Adding DamageFormulaUpdate, LimitbreakNotRefreshable, JunctionDependOfLevel, JunctionDependOfMinLevelQuantity, TrueRandomness, G-Soldier • 0.5 Change DamageFormulaUpdate, DrawNotLimited • 0.6 Adding AiRework, QueenForest , TripleTryhard, SquallComputeHit, 255HitCanFail, GerogeroUncensoredMenu, GerogeroUncensoredBattle DrawPoint, FieldRework, MngrpRework, ShopRework, WIP, MonsterRework/Balanced Fixing SaveAnywhere • 0.7: Fix worldmap draw by changing SquallComputeHit, fix DrawRework/Draw100, fix encounter in forest Remove NoUnequippedOnDream (Creates bug when switching GF). • 0.8: Independent mod ! Adding XP and AP multiplier.
